tluaMultiReturnCallSpread.tlua(21,26): error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'number' is not assignable to parameter of type 'boolean'.
tluaMultiReturnCallSpread.tlua(24,16): error TLUA2554: Expected 3 arguments, but got 2.
tluaMultiReturnCallSpread.tlua(25,27): error TLUA2554: Expected 2 arguments, but got 3.


==== tluaMultiReturnCallSpread.tlua (3 errors) ====
    function pair(): (number, string)
      return 1, "a";
    end
    
    function takes2(a: number, b: string): boolean
      return true;
    end
    
    function takes3(a: boolean, b: number, c: string): number
      return b;
    end
    
    // The last argument expands its whole pack.
    local expanded = takes2(pair());
    local mixed = takes3(true, pair());
    
    // A non-tail call truncates to its first value.
    local truncated = takes2(pair(), "x");
    
    // Truncation type mismatch: the first value is a number, not a boolean.
    local wrongHead = takes3(pair(), 1, "y");
                             ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'number' is not assignable to parameter of type 'boolean'.
    
    // Arity errors count the expanded values.
    local tooFew = takes3(pair());
                   ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2554: Expected 3 arguments, but got 2.
!!! related TLUA6210 tluaMultiReturnCallSpread.tlua:9:40: An argument for 'c' was not provided.
    local tooMany = takes2(1, pair());
                              ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2554: Expected 2 arguments, but got 3.
